response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the entry-level seniority target but brings directly relevant TypeScript, React, Node.js, and SQL experience, plus AI/LLM and MCP exposure aligning with the nice-to-haves. Berlin-based, satisfying on-site requirement. Main risk is overqualification and salary expectations for a junior/mid role, and only basic German which may matter in a renewable energy / construction client context.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and REST fullstack experience across multiple Berlin-based roles
AI/LLM and MCP infrastructure exposure matches nice-to-have qualifications
Berlin-based, meeting high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Significantly overqualified for a junior/mid entry-level position — retention and salary fit risk
Only basic German, which may limit collaboration with German energy-consulting and construction stakeholders
MongoDB-heavy database background rather than PostgreSQL specifically
